name: sil
description: Skeleton OpenClaw plugin for sil — registers stub tools a developer copies to add real ones.

sil_api_url.description: Override for the sil backend URL. Falls back to the SIL_API_URL env var, then https://sil.4gpts.com. The skeleton's stub tools never call it; it exists to demonstrate the plugin-config override path.

sil_api_url.label: sil backend URL
sil_api_url.help: Override only for staging or self-hosted deployments. Unused by the stub tools.

security.packagingNote: Compiled JavaScript ships under ./dist. register() stays synchronous and opens nothing — it only registers tools. ALL I/O happens inside a tool's execute(): sil_register calls sil-web over the network, writes tokens.json + config.json to the plugin data directory (owner-only, 0600), and arms a bounded background poll timer that stops on the first terminal claim outcome or after the session deadline. The PKCE verifier is held only in memory and is never written to disk. Tokens are never logged.
